s2.ptxt: Coat a new O-ring with ATF, and install it to the underdrive clutch drum.

atten3.ptxt: Install the O-ring carefully not to have a twist or a pinching.

s2.ptxt: Coat the underdrive clutch piston with ATF, and install it to the underdrive clutch piston drum.

item.ptxt: Be careful not to damage the O-ring.
Be careful not to damage the lip seal of the piston.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL UNDERDRIVE CLUTCH RETURN SPRING SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Install the return spring to the underdrive clutch drum.

atten3.ptxt: After installing the spring sub-assembly, check all of the springs are fitted in the piston correctly.

s2.ptxt: Coat the clutch balancer with ATF.
Install the clutch balancer to the underdrive clutch drum.

atten3.ptxt: Be careful not to damage the lip seal of the clutch balancer.

s2.ptxt: Place SST on the clutch balancer and compress the piston return spring with a press.
Using a snap ring expander, install the snap ring to the underdrive clutch drum.

item.ptxt: Stop the press when the spring seat is lowered to the place 1 to 2 mm (0.039 to 0.078 in.) from the snap ring groove. This prevents the spring seat from being deformed.
Do not expand the snap ring excessively.

s2.ptxt: Position the end gap of the snap ring in the underdrive clutch drum as shown in the illustration.

atten3.ptxt: The end gap of the snap ring should not be aligned with any of the stoppers.

s2.ptxt: Install the 3 plates, 3 discs, and flange to the underdrive clutch drum.

atten3.ptxt: Be careful about the order of discs, plates, and flange.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL NO. 2 UNDERDRIVE CLUTCH FLANGE HOLE SNAP RING

s2.ptxt: Using a screwdriver, install the No. 2 underdrive clutch flange hole snap ring.
Check that the end gap of the snap ring is not aligned with one of the cutouts.

atten3.ptxt: The snap ring should be securely engaged in the groove of the drum.
